allow: Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('totals:', json.dumps\(d['totals'], indent=2\)\); print\('regionDrilldown keys:', list\(d['regionDrilldown'].keys\(\)\)[:3]\); print\('peakYearCounts sample:', d['peakYearCounts'][:5]\); print\('rangeCounts sample:', d['rangeCounts'][:5]\)")

PowerShell(Start-Process -FilePath "pwsh" -ArgumentList "-Command", "Set-Location 'c:\\Dev\\MaCave'; npm run dev" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; try { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3015/api/dashboard" -TimeoutSec 5 | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 2 } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" })

PowerShell(Start-Process -FilePath "pwsh" -ArgumentList "-NoExit", "-Command", "Set-Location 'c:\\Dev\\MaCave'; npm run dev -w backend" -WindowStyle Minimized; Start-Sleep -Seconds 7; Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3015/api/health")

PowerShell($d = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3015/api/dashboard"; Write-Host "=== totals ==="; $d.totals | ConvertTo-Json; Write-Host "`n=== peakYearCounts \(5 premiers\) ==="; $d.peakYearCounts | Select-Object -First 5 | ConvertTo-Json; Write-Host "`n=== rangeCounts \(5 premiers\) ==="; $d.rangeCounts | Select-Object -First 5 | ConvertTo-Json; Write-Host "`n=== regionDrilldown \(1 region\) ==="; $region = \($d.regionDrilldown | Get-Member -MemberType NoteProperty | Select-Object -First 1\).Name; Write-Host "Region: $region"; $d.regionDrilldown.$region | ConvertTo-Json)
